textByHashes.2ca2ff9b76dc01ae57a4fcbed8284821dcfef1ed: A unique farming patch. This cave is the only place we've succesfully been able to grow a Hespori.
textByHashes.9a5e334dd81da422503fd71198e9c30d12858d49: A rare carnivorous plant originally from Morytania. When grown, the plant becomes conscious and highly aggressive. They are truly fascinating.
textByHashes.25b90b4ab882a72e6123d9e6452cd4a9bb64aca2: Of course. Just plant some Hespori seeds in the cave below and it will grow like any other plant. A Hespori is pretty tough so you don't need to worry about it getting diseased.
textByHashes.5844f95ee3a94fedc20d524e0cd615ac0a21578f: Do be careful though. A fully grown Hespori can be quite troublesome to deal with.
textByHashes.de287bc07f8cea720f8258aeae9e7058b8751863: I'm afraid not. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.
textByHashes.77900e2ba6b74e9bb5b6f0f1d302ebca6958227e: I do indeed. You really should be more careful.
textByHashes.e7928fa104aaeea2da21d0dda752b5a359ec011b: Very well. You'll no longer find Hespori seeds when farming.
textByHashes.fe3ac50d1abbaec5faf569550cc0a2b1c101d6fc: Very well. You'll now have a chance of finding Hespori seeds when farming.
textByHashes.3dd96a09ba14a720912a108e998740c37f0c23c3: I'm afraid I don't have anything for you. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.
textByHashes.d7b5e059ed69156a00aed49d338f586171df8721: Can you hear me down there? I have some of your items, from a previous visit. Shouldn't you collect them from me before fighting the Hespori again?
